docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2009 - CONTINUED TO DEC-07-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY BLANDON, EVA LAXAMANA, CARMEN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANDON, EVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAXAMANA, CARMEN $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BLANDON, EVA

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAXAMANA, CARMEN
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT LAXAMANA, CARMEN HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE - ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (SERVED APR-26-2012 BY PERSONAL SERVICE)((FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) AS TO DEFENDANT LAXAMANA, CARMEN
THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUN-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
INVOICE SERVICE OF DOCUMENTS OF NOTICE ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, RECEIVED AND FILED.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (CLERICAL ERROR ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION NOTICE) HEARING ON JUNE 7, 2012, WENT OFF CALENDAR IN ERR. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ORIGINALLY SET FOR 6-7-12 IS RE-SET BY THE COURT ON JUL-19-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. THE 7-7-12 HEARING ON THE NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS INCORRECT. THE NEW HEARING DATE IS 7-19-2012.
CLAIM OF EXEMTION AND COUNTER AFFIDAVIT (SHERIFF'S PACKET) RECEIVED FROM SAN MATEO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
DUPLICATE COPY OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (SHERIFF'S PACKET) RECEIVED FROM SAN MATEO SHERIFF'S OFFICE FILED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY BLANDON, EVA LAXAMANA, CARMEN

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR JUL-19-2012 IS DENIED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. "THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO SETTLE THIS REQUEST FOR EXEMPTION FOR A FINAL PAYMENT OF $3,215 WHICH MUST BE PAID ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 30, 2012. CASE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 29, 2012 FOR CHECK TO CLEAR. IF CHECK CLEARS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR DEFENDANT'S CHECK TO CLEAR. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUL-19-2012 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. "THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO SETTLE THIS REQUEST FOR EXEMPTION FOR A FINAL PAYMENT OF $3,215 WHICH MUST BE PAID ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 30, 2012. CASE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 29, 2012 FOR CHECK TO CLEAR. IF CHECK CLEARS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAXAMANA, CARMEN

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF OCT-29-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMT FILE ON 10/4/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
